confident_interface.definition: CB-CB < 8 Å AND inter-chain PAE < 10 Å

interpretation: Boltz-2 — an architecture independent of the AlphaFold-Multimer that produced the original edge — independently recovers a localized KANSL3-KANSL1 interface (ipTM 0.47 global; a compact, confidently-placed contact patch KANSL3[279-448]-KANSL1[624-690] with interface pLDDT 0.70/0.59 and best-contact PAE 4.8 Å). Global ipTM/pDockQ are moderate, depressed by the large disordered regions of both proteins; the signal is a specific docked segment, not a high-confidence whole-complex fold. This is corroborating structural evidence for the certified edge, honestly moderate — not a claim of a solved complex.
